title: cleyera bolleana
intro: Cleyera bolleana, also known as the Chinese evergreen or golden catchfly, is a plant species in the family Theaceae, native to East Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cleyera bolleana include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
